name: Waldorf Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small salad bowl, combine mayonnaise, yogurt and lemon juice.
2. Core the apples and cut into bite-sized pieces. Dice the celery.
3. Add the diced celery to the bowl with the dressing.
4. Fold in the chopped walnuts.
5. Chill for up to two hours.
6. Toss before serving.
Variations: Bananas & pecans or peaches and peanuts can be used in the summer.
